title: feuilleea humilis
intro: Feuilleea humilis, also known as Indian sage or Nilgiri chrysanthemum, is a plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is commonly found in the Indian subcontinent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Feuilleea humilis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Feuilleea humilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
